word: H2486 - חָלִילָה - châlîylâh - khaw-lee'-law - Be far

sections.paragraph:
Original: חללה חלילה

Transliteration: châlı̂ylâh châlilâh

Phonetic: khaw-lee'-law

BDB Definition:

  1. far be it (from me), God forbid that, let it not be

Origin: a directive from H2490

TWOT entry: 661c

Part(s) of speech: Interjection
